mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO collect
user_id,
video_id,
favorite,
favorite_name,
is_public,
create_time,
#{bean.userId},
#{bean.videoId},
#{bean.favorite},
#{bean.favoriteName},
#{bean.isPublic},
#{bean.createTime},

INSERT INTO collect
user_id,
video_id,
favorite,
favorite_name,
is_public,
create_time,
#{bean.userId},
#{bean.videoId},
#{bean.favorite},
#{bean.favoriteName},
#{bean.isPublic},
#{bean.createTime},
on DUPLICATE key update
user_id = VALUES(user_id),
video_id = VALUES(video_id),
favorite = VALUES(favorite),
favorite_name = VALUES(favorite_name),
is_public = VALUES(is_public),
create_time = VALUES(create_time),

INSERT INTO collect( user_id, video_id, favorite, favorite_name, is_public, create_time )values
( #{item.userId}, #{item.videoId}, #{item.favorite}, #{item.favoriteName}, #{item.isPublic}, #{item.createTime} )

INSERT INTO collect( user_id, video_id, favorite, favorite_name, is_public, create_time )values
( #{item.userId}, #{item.videoId}, #{item.favorite}, #{item.favoriteName}, #{item.isPublic}, #{item.createTime} )
on DUPLICATE key update user_id = VALUES(user_id), video_id = VALUES(video_id), favorite = VALUES(favorite), favorite_name = VALUES(favorite_name), is_public = VALUES(is_public), create_time = VALUES(create_time)
mapper.update:
UPDATE collect c
user_id = #{bean.userId},
video_id = #{bean.videoId},
favorite = #{bean.favorite},
favorite_name = #{bean.favoriteName},
is_public = #{bean.isPublic},
create_time = #{bean.createTime},
mapper.select: select favorite from collect c where c.video_id is not null order by favorite desc LIMIT 1
